title: Enable Script Block Logging
description: Use PowerShell to enable Script Block Logging via the registry on PIPELINE-DC01.
context: You are logged into PIPELINE-DC01 as a domain administrator. Script Block Logging is currently disabled.

steps.instruction: Check whether the ScriptBlockLogging registry key exists.
steps.hint: Use Get-Item or Get-ItemProperty with the HKLM: path.
steps.successOutput:
Get-Item : Cannot find path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\PowerShell\ScriptBlockLogging' because it does not exist.
At line:1 char:1
+ Get-Item HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\PowerShell\ScriptBlockLogging
steps.feedbackOnWrong: Navigate to HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\PowerShell and check for ScriptBlockLogging.
